must_detect.matched_text: Coverage context: obligations assessed under U.S. Rule 10b-5 standards and Regulation FD; disclosure timing followed 8-K Item 1.05 and Regulation S-K Item 106 guidance.

As publicly disclosed on 05/02/2025 via Form 8-K Item 1.05 and a same-day press release, services were restored and controls enhanced.
This report aligns with the disclosure previously posted to ir.northharborhb.example and the Q1 Form 10-Q risk factor updates filed 05/10/2025.
Data impact assessment (public): logs contained only placeholders such as SSN: 000-00-0000, Acct#: 0000000000, and MRN: MRN-TEST-000; no consumer, household, or patient data were compromised.
Internal references: Policy PD-INS-000 (quarterly insider trading blackout), SOP-CYB-014 (third-party outage triage); these policies are longstanding and not event-specific.
Materiality: management determined the outage immaterial to issuer results and customer harm; this conclusion was communicated in the 05/02/2025 public statement.
Communications log (public): customer notice posted on 04/19/2025; investor FAQ published 05/03/2025; role mailbox for inquiries remains ir@northharborhb.example.
Vendor corrective action (non-issuer operational update): GreyPine Networks rotated DNS keys and added change-control gates on 04/20/2025.
Coverage context: obligations assessed under U.S. Rule 10b-5 standards and Regulation FD; disclosure timing followed 8-K Item 1.05 and Regulation S-K Item 106 guidance.
Intentionally flagged for review: on 04/29/2025, prior to the 05/02 Form 8-K, a draft Q&A noting the 38-minute duration was emailed to two sell-side firms (Ridgetop Securities LP and Elmcrest Research LLC); potential selective disclosure risk under Reg FD.
